prompt: 사용자 [{:name "a" :age 20 :score 90} {:name "b" :age 17 :score 85} {:name "c" :age 25 :score 70}] 중 18+ 성인의 점수만 더한 합계(160)를 출력하세요. (90+70=160)
reference_solution: (let [[users (list {:name "a" :age 20 :score 90} {:name "b" :age 17 :score 85} {:name "c" :age 25 :score 70})] [adults (filter (fn [u] (>= (get u :age) 18)) users)] [scores (map (fn [u] (get u :score)) adults)]] (println (reduce (fn [a b] (+ a b)) 0 scores)))
